---
title: "Metagenomic Analysis of Fecal Samples as a Differential Diagnostic Tool for Colorectal Cancer"
toc: false
---

## Master's Capstone

**Publication status:** The target journal is the American Society for Microbiology; this work has not yet been published.

[Open or download the full pdf](TherayessMaster.pdf){.btn .btn-primary}

[Download the supplementary materials](TherayessSupplementaryMaterials.pdf){.btn .btn-outline-primary}

<iframe
  src="TherayessMaster.pdf"
  title="Master's Capstone"
  width="100%"
  height="900"
  style="border: 1px solid #dee2e6; border-radius: 0.375rem;"
>
  <p>
    Your browser cannot display the embedded PDF.
    <a href="TherayessMaster.pdf">Open the capstone directly.</a>
  </p>
</iframe>
